meaning: n.[美橄]攻方持球,触地,触地得分,着地,降落
examples: Patten scored his second touchdown of the game.
The astronauts are preparing for touchdown tomorrow morning.
He caught a punt and scored the winning touchdown, with a minute left to play.
Following his touchdown, which put Buffalo up 13-7, Johnson put on an elaborate celebration.
But a distaste for touchdown celebrations should not be served with a side plate of righteousness.
